job_description: Tele-Marketing cum Business Development Officer : Swosti Limited Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Swosti Limited Tele-Marketing cum Business Development Officer Application Deadline : 07 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Location: Dhaka Published: 05 Feb 2026 To access Application Insights Get Bdjobs Pro Requirements Education Additional Requirements Experience in Institutional sales/marketing will get preference. Excellent interpersonal, communication and convincing skill. Sound Accounting knowledge. Proficient in MS Word, Excel, Email, Power Point, & computer skills. Must be Enthusiastic, Pro-active, Punctual, Honest and Hard-working. You must possess your own Android Mobile phone & Laptop. You have to use official SIM for client communication, if you are selected. This is a Target orient job, so you need NOT apply, if you are not confident in selling. Responsibilities & Context Job Context: This is a focal position responsible for generating new Sales Lead for the company. It will require regular cold-calling to new & potential clients and frequent visit to customer office premises and introduce our product(s) & service(s) to the potential customer(s), make presentation, close sales and receive customers’ feedback on a regular basis. It will also require promotional and campaign efforts to promote software brand through digital channels – phonecalls, WhatsApp, YouTube, Facebook, Email, SMS etc. Though, you will generate initial sales lead through cold-calling a potential client; however, you may have to frequently visit clients’ office premises to make product presentation and closing sales as per need. Job Description / Responsibility Call new and potential clients on a regular basis. Visit & meet and make presentation potential customers as and when needed. Analyze products, competitors’ offerings and prepare proposals. Execute promotional activities through email, social media tool, telephone calls etc. Respond queries from potential customers and convert into sales lead. Demonstrate Software product and make presentation to clients. Skills & Expertise Suggested by CLIENT VISIT Communication Marketing Sales Sales & Marketing Telesales Compensation & Other Benefits Why Join Swosti Ltd.? Work in a fast-paced and innovative software company. Competitive salary, Attractive Sales Commission and growth opportunities. Opportunity to work on exciting and impactful projects. Friendly and collaborative work environment. Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka Read Before Apply Please send your Application along with CV mentioning the position applied for in the subject line to `swosti247@gmail.com`. Special Note: Vocal and Energetic females looking to develop a Corporate Marketing career are also encouraged to apply. Apply Procedure Email Y

Radiographer : Stemz Health Care BD Ltd. Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Stemz Health Care BD Ltd. Radiographer Application Deadline : 07 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Age: 22 to 35 years Location: Dhaka, Sylhet Salary: Negotiable Published: 05 Feb 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. To access Application Insights Get Bdjobs Pro Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 22 to 35 years Strong knowledge of laboratory techniques and procedures. Proficiency in using laboratory equipment and instruments. Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills. Attention to detail and accuracy. Candidate Must be a non-smoker. Responsibilities & Context Ensure that patients are properly prepared for chest X-rays, which may involve instructing them to remove jewelry or clothing that could interfere with the imaging. Accurately position patients to capture clear and detailed images of the chest area, following standardized protocols. Use lead shielding strategically to protect sensitive areas of the patient`s body from unnecessary radiation exposure. Clearly communicate the procedure to patients, addressing any concerns they may have and helping them feel at ease during the examination. Coordinate with physicians and other healthcare professionals to understand the specific diagnostic requirements for chest imaging. Implement radiation safety measures rigorously to minimize radiation exposure to both the patient and the healthcare team. Regularly assess the quality of chest radiographic images, making adjustments to equipment settings for optimal clarity and diagnostic value. Maintain detailed and accurate records of chest X-ray procedures, including patient information, technical factors used, and any relevant observations. Follow established protocols for chest radiography to ensure consistency in image acquisition and interpretation. Stay updated on the latest advancements and best practices in chest radiography through ongoing education and professional development. Skills & Expertise CT Scan and MRI Radiology & Imaging Compensation & Other Benefits Performance bonus Salary Review: Yearly Lunch Facilities: Partially Subsidize Festival Bonus: 2 Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka, Sylhet Company Information Stemz Health Care BD Ltd. Follow Address: Rupayan Trade Center 114, Kazi Nazrul Islam Avenue, Banglamotor, Ramna-1, Dhaka-1000. Preparing all Export Documents such as Commercial Invoice, P/List and other related documents as per Customs and Buyer requirements. Issuing EXP and duplicating EXP accordingly & FCR submission in Forwarder’s Portal. Preparing Invoices on ERP and the Buyers’ Portal. Ensure smooth day-to-day operations of all export-related activities in a professional, efficient, and trustworthy manner. Perform any other responsibilities assigned by Export In-Charge with the company’s export operation. Hands-on experience with AI Automation and connecting AI models via RESTful APIs. Familiarity with LLMs (Large Language Models) and prompt engineering techniques. Implement and fine-tune Machine Learning models for predictive analytics, vision-based detection, and behavior learning. We offer both outdoor and indoor services with a focus on pain management, paralysis treatment, and advanced physiotherapy rehabilitation. We take pride in our state-of-the-art diagnostic lab, specialized Pain & Paralysis Center, and advanced Rehabilitation & Physiotherapy Center. Our mission is to continuously research and implement the latest modern technologies to provide exceptional rehabilitation and pain management services, helping patients return to their vibrant lives. job_description: Online Sales Executive (Retail) / Brand Sales Executive (Wholesale) : Ornate Luggage and Bags Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Ornate Luggage and Bags Online Sales Executive (Retail) / Brand Sales Executive (Wholesale) Application Deadline : 07 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 2 Age: 20 to 35 years Location: Dhaka Salary: Tk. 15000 (Monthly) Published: 05 Feb 2026 To access Application Insights Get Bdjobs Pro Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 20 to 35 years Must be good at operating computers Strong typing, communicating & negotiating skills Experience in wholesale sales will get preference Willingness to work both office & field level Territory Marketing Wholesale & Online Sales Sales & Distribution Customer Relationship Management Sales Target Achievement Responsibilities & Context Company Information Ornate About Us: Mr. Keramat Ali established a luggage manufacturing business in East Pakistan in 1942 with the vision of building a stable and sustainable trade for his family. His entrepreneurial passion and dedication greatly influenced his son, Mr. Abdus Sattar, who grew up learning the values of discipline, perseverance, and business acumen from an early age. In the 1970s, Mr. Abdus Sattar entered the manufacturing sector by founding the Baly Group of Industries , initially focusing on footwear production, while also expanding into the apparel business over time. In 2004, driven by a commitment to deliver world-class luggage and travel goods for the global market, Mr. Abdus Sattar shifted his focus towards establishing a high-quality luggage manufacturing partnership in China. By this time, his daughter, Ms. Sabiha Sattar , had already acquired in-depth knowledge of the luggage industry under her father’s guidance and played a key role in developing the brand’s online presence under the name Ornate . Ornate is a foreign direct investment (FDI) company, founded in France in the year 2000, with its state-of-the-art manufacturing facility located in China. The company proudly holds the distinction of being the first Bangladeshi FDI in Guangdong Province , supported by a strong and dedicated Research & Development (R&D) department committed to innovation, quality, and global standards. Business Area Preference: Online Sales Wholesale Consumer Goods / Luggage / Bags (Preferred) Job Location Dhaka (Field work may require frequent market visit). Work at Office & Field. Chattogram (Chattogram Sadar) Salary: Negotiable Published: 23 Feb 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Responsibilities & Context Role Summary The Director of Wellness provides strategic and operational leadership for a comprehensive, culturally responsive, and evidence-based mental health and wellbeing ecosystem at the university. The university’s Wellness Program has been launched in May 2024 by the Founding Director of Wellness and is currently in the functional stage. The incoming Director is expected to continue this legacy, strengthen existing structures, fine-tune service delivery, and scale the program for long-term sustainability and impact. The role integrates clinical services, preventive mental health programming, peer support systems, and policy development to promote student wellbeing, academic success, and resilience — particularly for students from diverse and crisis-affected backgrounds. The Director serves as the university’s lead authority on student mental health, trauma-informed practice, and psychosocial wellbeing. Core Responsibilities 1) Program Leadership & Growth ●      Act as the Leader of the Wellness Program and take it to the next level of sustainability and vision. ●      Build upon the vision and established systems of the Wellness Program and work towards solidifying them. ●      Fine-tune workflows, protocols  and referral pathways, review periodically and ensure compliance thereof. ●      Strengthen quality assurance and effectiveness of all services provided by the Program. ●      Develop long-term strategy for sustainability and scalability. ●      Advise university leadership on any matters related to student wellbeing and safeguarding. ●      The Director will lead and supervise a multidisciplinary team consisting of: Clinical Psychologist(s) Counselling Psychologist(s) Psychiatrist Peer Mediators / Peer Supporters Wellness Ambassadors 2) Preventive Mental Health & Promotion ●      Lead and expand preventive mental health initiatives ●      Develop programs on resilience, emotional regulation, coping skills, and life skills ●      Integrate wellbeing promotion into campus life and student experience ●      Promote a proactive culture of mental wellbeing across campus and support transition, adjustment and retention of students 3) Clinical & Psychosocial Services Oversight ●      Oversee delivery of confidential student mental health services ●      Ensure trauma-informed and culturally sensitive care ●      Strengthen crisis response and suicide prevention systems

৩৩ কেভি সুইচইয়ার্ড সরঞ্জামের নিয়মিত রক্ষণাবেক্ষণে সক্রিয়ভাবে সম্পৃক্ত থাকা। প্রতিদিন সূর্যোদয়ের পূর্বে সাইটে উপস্থিত থেকে সৌর পিভি প্ল্যান্টকে সক্রিয় উৎপাদন অবস্থায় নিশ্চিত করা। প্রতিষ্ঠানের লক্ষ্য অর্জনের জন্য ওঅ্যান্ডএম দলের সাথে সমন্বয় সাধন করা। নির্ধারিত সময়সীমার (±৭ দিনের মধ্যে) মধ্যে ১০০% নিশ্চয়তার সাথে নির্ধারিত রক্ষণাবেক্ষণ কার্যক্রম সম্পন্ন করা। পিভি ফিল্ড, ইনভার্টার রুম ও এইচটি ইয়ার্ডে ৫এস বজায় রাখা (পিভি মডিউল ও প্ল্যান্টের ঘাস কাটা সহ)। অতিরিক্ত মজুদ বা ঘাটতি এড়াতে খুচরা যন্ত্রাংশের সঠিক হিসাব সংরক্ষণ করা। সেকশন স্টোর থেকে যথাযথ ডকুমেন্টেশন/সিস্টেমের মাধ্যমে উপকরণ job_title: Manager/Assistant Manager, Capability Development [Expert Sales Team]
job_description: Manager/Assistant Manager, Capability Development [Expert Sales Team] : Mutual Trading Company Ltd. - Authorized distributor of HALEON Bangladesh Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Mutual Trading Company Ltd. - Authorized distributor of HALEON Bangladesh Manager/Assistant Manager, Capability Development [Expert Sales Team] Application Deadline : 07 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Published: 25 Feb 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Responsibilities & Context Be a part of the Global Brands – Sensodyne, Eno, Parodontax, Aquafresh! The Capability Development Manager is responsible for elevating the skills, behaviors, and scientific selling capabilities of the sales team. The role ensures that sales team are equipped with the competencies required to drive high-quality in-chamber conversations, compliant promotion, territory productivity, and sustainable business growth. 1.       Capability Strategy & Framework Develop a structured capability framework covering scientific knowledge, detailing skills, in-chamber excellence, account planning, and compliant promotion standards. Assess current and future capability gaps across the sales organization and align the capability strategy with therapeutic area goals. 2.       Training Design & Delivery Design and deliver skill-building programs on scientific detailing, objection handling, disease awareness, product mastery, communication, influence, and negotiation. Create role-based training with clear competency levels. Conduct onboarding for new hires, ensuring strong scientific grounding and field-readiness. 3.       Collaboration with Medical & Marketing Teams Work closely with Medical Affairs to ensure accuracy, compliance, and scientific rigor in all contents. Partner with Marketing to convert brand strategies into capability programs that strengthen execution. Support product launches with training content, scientific modules, and field readiness workshops. 4.       Field Coaching & Performance Improvement Extensive field visit across Bangladesh to conduct joint visits to observe, diagnose and coach sales team on call quality, scientific conversations, and in-chamber behaviors. Build coaching capability of line managers through structured coaching frameworks and feedback models. Create individual development plans (IDPs) based on capability assessments. 5. Content & Learning Tools Development Develop high-quality training materials, playbooks, scientific modules, e-learning content, simulations, and role-play scenarios. Ensure training materials comply with regulatory, ethical, and promotional codes. Collaborate with Marketing to implement digital learning tools (LMS, microlearning, assessments, capability dashboards).

The Opportunity The project aims to strengthen the economic resilience of disadvantaged young women in Bangladesh, through market-relevant skills development, digital and vocational training, job placement, entrepreneurship, financial inclusion, and gender-transformative approaches that address structural barriers and restrictive social norms. job_title: Team Member, Responsible Business Conduct (RBC) Cell
job_description: Team Member, Responsible Business Conduct (RBC) Cell : Leathergoods & Footwear Manufacturers and Exporters Association of Bangladesh (LFMEAB) Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Leathergoods & Footwear Manufacturers and Exporters Association of Bangladesh (LFMEAB) Team Member, Responsible Business Conduct (RBC) Cell Application Deadline : 07 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Published: 09 Feb 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Experience: A minimum of 3-5 years of experience in Responsible Business Conduct (RBC), sustainability, ethical business conduct, HRDD or related fields. Strong understanding of global RBC principles, including sustainability, labor rights, and ethical sourcing. Ability to build and maintain relationships with diverse stakeholders. Proficiency in relevant software and tools for research and data analysis. Additional Skills: Strong knowledge of relevant RBC frameworks (e.g., UN Global Compact, OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises, ILO Conventions). Familiarity with environmental and social sustainability reporting (e.g., GRI, CDP, SASB standards). Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines. Excellent communication and presentation skills in both English and Bangla. Responsibilities & Context Job Overview: The Responsible Team Member of the Business Conduct (RBC) Cell will support the promotion and implementation of responsible business practices within LFMEAB member factories, with a strong focus on sustainability, ethical operations, and compliance with international standards. The role involves collaborating with internal teams, member organizations, and external stakeholders to ensure alignment with global Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) principles. Workplace: LFMEAB Head Office Key Responsibilities Evaluating factory performance on ESG, RBC, HREDD through data collection. Support the implementation of Responsible Business Conduct (RBC) strategies within LFMEAB’s operations and throughout the supply chain of its member organizations. অগ্রাধিকারযোগ্য। অন্যান্য শর্তাবলি লাইসেন্সসহ মটর সাইকেল থাকতে হবে। (মটরসাইকেল না থাকলে সাক্ষাতকারে অংশগ্রহণ করা যাবে না।) উচ্চতা ন্যূনতম ৫ ফুট ৬ ইঞ্চি হতে হবে। শুধুমাত্র পুরুষ প্রার্থীগণ অংশগ্রহণ করতে পারবেন। পূর্বে যারা অংশগ্রহণ করেছেন পুনরায় অংশগ্রহণ করার প্রয়োজন নেই। Responsibilities & Context মূল দায়িত্বসমূহ নির্দিষ্ট এরিয়া বা টেরিটরি মাসিক/ত্রৈমাসিক/বার্ষিক বিক্রয় লক্ষ্য অর্জন নিশ্চিত করা। ডিস্ট্রিবিউশন নেটওয়ার্ক শক্তিশালী করা ও মনিটরিং করা। রুট প্ল্যান, এরিয়া/টেরিটরি ম্যানেজমেন্ট এবং ফিল্ড কভারেজ সঠিকভাবে বাস্তবায়ন করা। দৈনিক সেলস সফ্টওয়্যারে পোস্টিং দেওয়া। ফিল্ড সেলস টিমকে গাইড, ট্রেন ও মনিটর করা। দৈনিক সেলস কল, ভিজিট ও লাইনকভারেজ সঠিকভাবে হচ্ছে কিনা নিশ্চিত করা। কর্মীদের টার্গেট পারফরম্যান্স মূল্যায়ন ও প্রয়োজনীয় কোচিং প্রদান। নতুন সেলস স্টাফ রিক্রুটমেন্ট ও ট্রেনিংয়ে সহায়তা করা। নির্ধারিত মার্কেটিং কার্যক্রম (ভিজিবিলিটি, ব্র্যান্ডিং, প্রমোশন) মাঠে সঠিকভাবে বাস্তবায়ন করা। রিটেইল পয়েন্টে ব্র্যান্ডের ভিজিবিলিটি ও ডিস্ট্রিবিউশন উন্নত করা। ডিস্ট্রিবিউটরের ইনভেন্টরি ম্যানেজমেন্ট মনিটর করা যাতে বাজারে স্টক আউট না হয়। ডেলিভারি চ্যানেল, রুট ভায়োলেশন ও ডিস্ট্রিবিউশন গ্যাপ শনাক্ত ও সমাধান করা। দৈনিক, সাপ্তাহিক ও মাসিক MIS রিপোর্ট প্রস্তুত ও ম্যানেজমেন্টে জমা দেওয়া। সেলস ডেটা বিশ্লেষণ করে এরিয়া বা টেরিটরি পারফরম্যান্স উন্নয়নে প্রয়োজনীয় কর্মপরিকল্পনা তৈরি করা। বাংলাদেশের যে যে জেলায় পদায়ন হবে (নিজ জেলা ব্যতীত) ঢাকা, গাজীপুর, মানিকগঞ্জ, ফরিদপুর, সাতক্ষীরা, খুলনা, যশোর, চুয়াডাঙ্গা, মাদারীপুর, বরিশাল, পটুয়াখালি, ভোলা, বি-বাড়িয়া, নারায়ণগঞ্জ, সিলেট, কিশোরগঞ্জ, সুনামগঞ্জ, মৌলভীবাজার, হবিগঞ্জ, ময়মনসিংহ, টাঙ্গাইল, জামালপুর, কুমিল্লা, নোয়াখালী, শেরপুর, চাঁদপুর, ফেনী, Benefits বেতন ও সুবিধাদি শিক্ষানবিশকালে মাসিক বেতন ২৪,০০০ টাকা এবং শিক্ষানবিশকাল শেষে ২৬,০০০ টাকা। প্রভিডেন্ট ফান্ড গ্র্যাচুইটি উৎসব ভাতা মেরামত বিল মোবাইল ও ইন্টারনেট বান্ডেল প্রশিক্ষণের সুযোগ মোটর
